channel.title: Release_news on DAMON Project Website
channel.description: Recent content in Release_news on DAMON Project Website

item.title: DAMON Release News Letter (v7.0-rc1..v7.1-rc1)
item.description: This is also posted to the mailing list. Hello community, This news letter covers DAMON features that landed on the mainline, and misc events that were interesting to me that happened in v7.0-rc1..v7.1-rc1 time period (2026-02-22..2026-04.26). The news letter covering the previous release cycle (v6.19-rc1..v7.0-rc1) is also available [1]. Changes Landed On v7.0 All changes that were landed on v7.0-rc1 have successfully landed on v7.0. Read the news letter for v7.

item.title: DAMON Release News (v6.19-rc1..v7.0-rc1)
item.description: This is also posted to the mailing list. Hello community, I shared DAMON quarterly news [1, 2, 3, 4] in 2024. I was further planning to write that for 2025 Q1. But I dropped the ball and never finished it. I’m starting a new series of DAMON news, that aims to cover each -rc1 release. This news letter covers DAMON features that landed on the mainline, and misc events that were interesting to me that happened in v6.
